name: frontend-app
description: Frontend application docs with an emphasis on components, state management, routing, and theming.
structure:
```text
mkdocs.yml                     <- MkDocs config (see the mkdocs.yml template)
docs/
  index.md                     <- App overview, screenshots, who uses it
  architecture.md              <- Component tree + data flow diagram
  setup.md                     <- Install, run dev server, build
  components/                  <- THE FOCUS: component & UI reference
    index.md                   <- Component catalog / index
    <area>.md                  <- One per feature area or component group
  guides/
    index.md                   <- Guides index
    state-management.md        <- Stores/context, data fetching
    routing.md                 <- Route map + navigation
    theming.md                 <- Design tokens, dark mode, i18n
.magestic-ai/.docgen.json      <- {last_run, head_sha, scope_hash}
```
mkdocs_yml:
```yaml
site_name: <app name from package.json or directory name>
site_description: <one-line from README or CLAUDE.md>
docs_dir: docs

theme:
  name: material
  features:
    - navigation.tabs
    - navigation.sections
    - navigation.expand
    - navigation.top
    - search.suggest
    - search.highlight
    - content.code.copy
  palette:
    - media: "(prefers-color-scheme: light)"
      scheme: default
      toggle:
        icon: material/weather-sunny
        name: Switch to dark mode
    - media: "(prefers-color-scheme: dark)"
      scheme: slate
      toggle:
        icon: material/weather-night
        name: Switch to light mode

markdown_extensions:
  - admonition
  - pymdownx.details
  - pymdownx.superfences:
      custom_fences:
        - name: mermaid
          class: mermaid
          format: !!python/name:pymdownx.superfences.fence_code_format
  - pymdownx.tabbed:
      alternate_style: true
  - tables
  - toc:
      permalink: true

nav:
  - Home: index.md
  - Architecture: architecture.md
  - Setup: setup.md
  - Components: components/index.md
  - Guides: guides/index.md
```
page_templates:
### `docs/index.md`

- One-paragraph "what this app is" and its primary user
- Tech stack in one line (framework, build tool, styling)
- Links to setup, component catalog, and guides

End with the `docgen` marker:

```markdown
<!-- docgen:auto -->
*Auto-generated. Last updated: <YYYY-MM-DD> from commit `<short-sha>`.*
```

### `docs/architecture.md`

- One-paragraph overview of how the UI is structured.
- A Mermaid component/data-flow diagram:

   ````markdown
   ```mermaid
   graph TD
       App --> Router
       Router --> Pages
       Pages --> Components
       Components --> Store[(State Store)]
       Store -->|fetch| API[Backend API]
   ```
   ````

- Table of top-level `src/` directories with one-line purposes.
- Note the data-fetching approach and where side effects live.

### `docs/setup.md`

- Prerequisites (Node version, package manager)
- Install dependencies
- Env vars (from `.env.example`) - API base URLs, feature flags
- Run the dev server
- Build for production
- Run tests / linter

### `docs/components/*.md` (PRIMARY FOCUS)

Document the component architecture. `components/index.md` is a catalog
grouped by feature area. For each significant component or group:
- **Purpose** - what it renders / owns
- **Key props** - name, type, required?, description
- **State it owns vs. receives** - local state, store slices, context
- **Notable interactions / events** it emits or handles
- **File path** so readers can jump to source

Focus on reusable and central components; skip trivial leaf presentational
ones. Don't paste full JSX - summarize the contract.

### `docs/guides/*.md`

- `state-management.md` - stores/context, how data flows, caching, when to
  put state global vs. local.
- `routing.md` - the route map (table of path -> component), nested routes,
  guards/redirects, navigation patterns.
- `theming.md` - design tokens / CSS variables, dark-mode mechanism,
  responsive breakpoints, and i18n if present.
extra_instructions: Prioritize the component reference under docs/components/ and the state/routing/theming guides. Describe component contracts (props, owned state) rather than pasting JSX.
